explanation: The recommendation requires a valid centrally governed delivery destination, but its exact premises cover trail scope, member mutation restrictions, new-account onboarding, and an opt-in Region caveat. None establishes the required S3 destination/policy behavior or the asserted governance boundary; a direct citation on the recommendation cannot replace an atomic premise.
required_action: Add exact verified premise claims for required organization-trail delivery destination policy and any intended central-governance property, then reverify the derivation.
suggested_revision: Derive the destination requirement from a separate atomic claim that an organization trail must use an S3 bucket policy allowing CloudTrail organization-log delivery.

supporting_source.locator: Create or update an Amazon S3 bucket to use to store the log files for an organization trail
supporting_source.title: Amazon S3 bucket policy for CloudTrail
